narrative:
Choctaw Lake West (precinct in Madison County) has 941 registered voters, with 44.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
